title: Senior Teacher - Mumbai University Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Mumbai University Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Mumbai University Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mumbai University Global Group:
Mumbai University Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University Global Group!
